title: Visualising roll distributions
text: roll_distribution() samples many rolls tallies often total comes . Passing result plot() draws bar chart counts across notation’s total range. Two six-sided dice give familiar triangular distribution, peaking 7.

what: A single roll against its distribution
title: Visualising roll distributions
text: plot() roll shows notation’s exact theoretical outcome distribution highlights bar total actually rolled. subtitle reports roll’s percentile standing, “beats P% outcomes” reading compare = TRUE print path uses. plot always shows theoretical distribution, whether roll created compare = TRUE.

what: Comparing a flat roll with a keep selector
title: Visualising roll distributions
text: Keep selectors change distribution’s shape. common example character-ability generation: 4d6h3 (roll four dice, keep highest three) skews higher flat 3d6, even though range 3 18. Sampling notation plotting results shows shift.
code: set.seed(42) plot(roll_distribution("3d6", n = 20000)) set.seed(42) plot(roll_distribution("4d6h3", n = 20000))

title: Visualising roll distributions
text: plot() method returns standard ggplot object, can capture keep composing +, example recolour bars drop subtitle.
code: set.seed(42) p <- plot(roll_distribution("2d6", n = 10000)) p +   geom_col(fill = "darkorange") +   labs(subtitle = NULL)

title: Visualising roll distributions
text: plot() method works notation sums several terms. Adding 1d20+1d6 combines flat twenty-sided die six-sided die, spreading total wider range either die alone.

title: Get started with rollr2
text: roll() takes single notation string returns roll object. Printing shows notation, individual dice, adjusted total. roll object list. three fields use : dice: integer vector every die rolled (across terms, order, notation several). kept: dice contribute total (equal dice keep selector). total: grand total, sum every term’s kept dice plus modifier. multi-term notation, terms holds per-term breakdown (term’s dice, kept, subtotal), dice kept stay concatenation across terms. notation carries keep selector, kept subset dice printout gains Kept: line. 4d6h3 rolls four six-sided dice keeps highest three.
code: set.seed(42) r <- roll("2d20+2") r #> <roll> 2d20+2 #> Dice:  17, 5 #> Total: 24 r$dice #> [1] 17  5 r$kept #> [1] 17  5 r$total #> [1] 24 set.seed(42) kept_roll <- roll("4d6h3") kept_roll #> <roll> 4d6h3 #> Dice:  1, 5, 1, 1 #> Kept:  5, 1, 1 #> Total: 7  kept_roll$dice #> [1] 1 5 1 1 kept_roll$kept #> [1] 5 1 1 kept_roll$total #> [1] 7

title: Get started with rollr2
text: notation can sum several terms joined + -, can add different dice constants one call. term grammar (dice, optional keep selector, optional modifier), - term subtracts whole contribution, bare integer constant term. Keep selection applies within term ; keep across whole expression. printout shows one Dice: line per dice term single grand Total:. per-term detail lives terms. - term subtracts , keep selector still applies within term, 2d20h+2d20l (advantage plus disadvantage) 2d20h-1d6.
code: set.seed(42) mixed <- roll("1d20+1d6+3") mixed #> <roll> 1d20+1d6+3 #> Dice:  17 #> Dice:  5 #> Total: 25 mixed$total #> [1] 25 mixed$terms[[1]]$subtotal #> [1] 17 mixed$terms[[2]]$subtotal #> [1] 8 set.seed(42) roll("2d20h+2d20l") #> <roll> 2d20h+2d20l #> Dice:  17, 5 #> Kept:  17 #> Dice:  1, 10 #> Kept:  1 #> Total: 18

title: Get started with rollr2
text: roll_distribution() rolls whole notation n times summarises distribution totals. print method shows possible total range, count per observed outcome, text histogram. returned roll_distribution object stores observed totals counts, named integer vector whose names outcome totals (ascending, zero-count outcomes dropped), plus theoretical range possible totals.

title: Get started with rollr2
text: parser accepts following forms. leading d case-insensitive surrounding whitespace tolerated. keep selector follows die size comes modifier, full notation reads count, die size, optional keep selector, optional modifier, example 4d6h3+1. drop selector occupies slot keep selector inverse spelling: dropping K N dice keeps N - K, 4d6dl1 (drop lowest four d6, conventional D&D ability-score roll) exactly 4d6h3, 4d6dh1 (drop highest) 4d6l3. shorthand 4d6d1 drops lowest, missing count (4d6dl) drops one die. term carries one selector, keep drop combined. systems reroll dice land threshold. reroll marker follows die size (keep selector modifier) comes two forms, required threshold T. rT (reroll ) die showing value <= T rerolled exactly new value kept unconditionally, even also <= T. motivating case D&D 5e Great Weapon Fighting, damage die showing 1 2 rerolled : 2d6r2. rrT (reroll ) die showing <= T rerolled repeatedly lands strictly T, 1d20rr1 yields value uniform 2..20 never natural 1. reroll marker composes keep selector modifier (4d6r1h3, 2d6r1+2). Several terms may joined + - one notation, bare integer constant term. least one dice term required (pure number like 3 valid notation), keep selector applies within term . bare +M/-M immediately dice term binds term’s modifier term modifier yet, exactly single-term case: 1d6+3 one dice term modifier +3, 2d6+2+1d4 modified dice term (2d6+2) plus second dice term. signed integer, term already modifier, becomes standalone constant term: 1d6+3+1 dice term modifier +3 plus constant +1. missing die count means one die (d6 1d6). missing modifier means adjustment (M = 0). missing keep count means keep one die (2d20h keeps single highest die). missing drop count means drop one die (4d6dl drops single lowest die), shorthand d drops lowest (4d6d1 4d6dl1). parser rejects notation outside bounds clear error: die count must positive integer. die size must integer least 2. keep count must 1 die count (keeping zero dice, dice rolled, rejected). drop count must 1 one less die count (dropping zero dice, dropping every die nothing left sum, rejected). reroll threshold T must 1 die size minus 1 (1 <= T <= X - 1); threshold 0 never fires threshold die size rejected, 2d6r0 2d6r6 parse. Non-integer counts, die sizes, keep drop counts (2.5d6, 2d6h1.5, 4d6dl1.5) parse.

title: Get started with rollr2
text: systems reroll dice land threshold. reroll marker follows die size (keep selector modifier) comes two forms, required threshold T. rT (reroll ) die showing value <= T rerolled exactly new value kept unconditionally, even also <= T. motivating case D&D 5e Great Weapon Fighting, damage die showing 1 2 rerolled : 2d6r2. rrT (reroll ) die showing <= T rerolled repeatedly lands strictly T, 1d20rr1 yields value uniform 2..20 never natural 1. reroll marker composes keep selector modifier (4d6r1h3, 2d6r1+2).

title: Get started with rollr2
text: Several terms may joined + - one notation, bare integer constant term. least one dice term required (pure number like 3 valid notation), keep selector applies within term . bare +M/-M immediately dice term binds term’s modifier term modifier yet, exactly single-term case: 1d6+3 one dice term modifier +3, 2d6+2+1d4 modified dice term (2d6+2) plus second dice term. signed integer, term already modifier, becomes standalone constant term: 1d6+3+1 dice term modifier +3 plus constant +1.

title: Get started with rollr2
text: missing die count means one die (d6 1d6). missing modifier means adjustment (M = 0). missing keep count means keep one die (2d20h keeps single highest die). missing drop count means drop one die (4d6dl drops single lowest die), shorthand d drops lowest (4d6d1 4d6dl1).

title: Get started with rollr2
text: parser rejects notation outside bounds clear error: die count must positive integer. die size must integer least 2. keep count must 1 die count (keeping zero dice, dice rolled, rejected). drop count must 1 one less die count (dropping zero dice, dropping every die nothing left sum, rejected). reroll threshold T must 1 die size minus 1 (1 <= T <= X - 1); threshold 0 never fires threshold die size rejected, 2d6r0 2d6r6 parse. Non-integer counts, die sizes, keep drop counts (2.5d6, 2d6h1.5, 4d6dl1.5) parse.

what: Roll Tabletop RPG Dice from Notation
title: Roll Tabletop RPG Dice from Notation
text: rollr2 parses rolls tabletop RPG dice notation "2d20+2". single notation string reports every individual die, kept dice, adjusted total, can summarise outcome distribution across many repeated rolls.

title: Roll Tabletop RPG Dice from Notation
text: Install development version GitHub:

title: Roll Tabletop RPG Dice from Notation
text: roll() simulates single roll returns roll object holding individual dice total. functions stochastic, fix seed want reproducible output. keep selector like 4d6h3 keeps highest (h) lowest (l) dice; printout shows dice kept. inverse drop spelling 4d6dl1 (drop lowest four d6, conventional D&D ability-score roll) thing said way round. reroll marker like 2d6r2 rerolls die showing value threshold (2), keeping new value; rr instead rerolls die lands threshold. D&D 5e Great Weapon Fighting style reroll. notation can also sum several terms constants, joined + -.
code: library(rollr2)  set.seed(42) roll("2d20+2") #> <roll> 2d20+2 #> Dice:  17, 5 #> Total: 24 set.seed(42) roll("4d6h3") #> <roll> 4d6h3 #> Dice:  1, 5, 1, 1 #> Kept:  5, 1, 1 #> Total: 7 set.seed(42) roll("2d6r2") #> <roll> 2d6r2 #> Dice:  1, 5, 1, 1 #> Total: 6 set.seed(42) roll("1d20+1d6+3") #> <roll> 1d20+1d6+3 #> Dice:  17 #> Dice:  5 #> Total: 25

title: Roll Tabletop RPG Dice from Notation
text: roll_distribution() rolls whole notation many times summarises distribution totals, printing count per outcome text histogram.

title: Roll Tabletop RPG Dice from Notation
text: See vignette("rollr2") get started, “Visualising roll distributions” article package website ggplot2 visualisations roll outcomes.

what: Roll dice from notation once — roll
title: Roll dice from notation once — roll
text: Parses dice-notation string simulates single roll. notation may sum several terms joined +/- (example 1d20+1d6+3); dice term draws N independent uniform values 1..X, keeps highest/lowest K carries selector, contributes kept sum plus modifier M. - term subtracts term's whole contribution. Bare integer terms (constants) added directly. grand total sum every term's signed contribution.

title: Roll dice from notation once — roll
code: roll(notation, compare = FALSE)  # S3 method for class 'roll' print(x, ...)  # S3 method for class 'roll' plot(x, ...)

title: Roll dice from notation once — roll
text: notation length-1 character string. single dice term NdX, NdX+M, NdX-M, count-omitted dX variants (case-insensitive d, whitespace-tolerant), optionally keep selector h/l optional count die size (e.g. 2d20h, 4d6h3, 3d6l2), keeps highest (h) lowest (l) K dice (defaulting K = 1). slot drop selector dl/dh/d instead discards dice sums rest: NdXdlK drops lowest K, NdXdhK drops highest K, shorthand NdXdK drops lowest K; missing count drops one die. Drop inverse spelling keep, NdXdlK NdXh(N-K) NdXdhK NdXl(N-K); conventional D&D roll 4d6dl1 (drop lowest four d6) 4d6h3. drop count K must satisfy 1 <= K <= N - 1 (drop least one, leave least one). per-die marker may follow die size, keep drop selector modifier: either explode marker reroll marker, (mutually exclusive within term). explode marker ! (rerolls maximum-face die exactly sums two faces; extra die explode) !! (keeps rerolling maximum recurs, capped 100 chained rerolls per die). 2d6!, 2d6!!, 4d6!h3, 2d6!+1 valid. !! die reaches cap, roll() emits warning still returning valid roll. reroll marker rT (rerolls die showing <= T exactly keeps new value unconditionally, even also <= T) rrT (rerolls die showing <= T repeatedly lands strictly T), threshold T required bounded 1 <= T <= X - 1. Contrast explode marker: reroll replaces die's value, sum. 2d6r1, 1d20rr1, 4d6r1h3, 2d6r1+2 valid, reroll never warns. Several terms, plus bare integer constants, may joined + - one notation (e.g. 1d20+1d6, 2d20h+2d20l, 1d20+1d6+1d4+3); least one dice term required keep drop selector applies within term . See roll_distribution() summarise many rolls. compare length-1 logical. TRUE, printing roll also shows total sits within notation's full theoretical outcome distribution: header line stating percent outcomes roll beats, text histogram exact outcome probabilities rolled total's bar marked. Defaults FALSE, prints roll . comparison computed, sampled, given (notation, total) pair always reports standing. x roll object, returned roll(). ... Ignored, compatibility print() plot() generics.

title: Roll dice from notation once — roll
text: roll object: list dice (integer vector listing every die rolled, concatenation dice terms term order), total (integer scalar grand total: sum term's signed contribution), kept (dice contribute, concatenation term's kept dice term order), terms (per-term breakdown, element list term's parsed fields plus dice, kept, subtotal), original notation, compare (logical flag controlling print method). single-term notation parsed components n, x, m, keep, keep_n, explode, reroll, reroll_t also present top level; omitted multi-term notation, per-term access via terms required. exploding reroll term dice still lists every physical die including rerolls draw order (reroll term, rerolled-away faces listed ), kept lists kept per-die values.

title: Roll dice from notation once — roll
text: plot() returns themed ggplot2::ggplot() bar chart notation's exact theoretical outcome distribution, rolled total's bar highlighted percentile standing shown subtitle. plot always shows theoretical distribution never reads compare, remains print-switch. returned object auto-prints called top level can captured extended +.

title: Roll dice from notation once — roll

what: Summarise the outcome distribution of repeated rolls — roll_distribution
title: Summarise the outcome distribution of repeated rolls — roll_distribution
text: Simulates n whole-notation rolls summarises distribution resulting totals. distribution sampled (computed analytically), results vary run run unless seed fixed set.seed(). notation may sum several terms joined +/-; simulated roll draws every dice term, applies term's keep selector (h/l) within term summing, adds term modifiers bare integer constants, total grand total across terms.

title: Summarise the outcome distribution of repeated rolls — roll_distribution
code: roll_distribution(notation, n)  # S3 method for class 'roll_distribution' print(x, ...)  # S3 method for class 'roll_distribution' plot(x, ...)

title: Summarise the outcome distribution of repeated rolls — roll_distribution
text: notation length-1 character string. single dice term NdX, NdX+M, NdX-M, count-omitted dX variants (case-insensitive d, whitespace-tolerant), optionally keep selector h/l optional count die size (e.g. 2d20h, 4d6h3), keeping highest/lowest K dice per roll (defaulting K = 1). slot drop selector dl/dh/d instead discards dice sums rest: NdXdlK drops lowest K, NdXdhK drops highest K, shorthand NdXdK drops lowest K; missing count drops one die. Drop inverse spelling keep, NdXdlK NdXh(N-K) NdXdhK NdXl(N-K); 4d6dl1 (D&D ability-score roll) 4d6h3. drop count K must satisfy 1 <= K <= N - 1. per-die marker may follow die size, keep drop selector modifier: either explode marker reroll marker, (mutually exclusive within term). explode marker ! (rerolls maximum-face die sums faces) !! (rerolls maximum recurs, capped 100 chained rerolls per die), e.g. 2d6!, 2d6!!, 4d6!h3; sampling bounded cap always terminates, roll_distribution() warn cap. reroll marker rT (rerolls die showing <= T keeps new value) rrT (rerolls die showing <= T lands strictly T), threshold T required bounded 1 <= T <= X - 1, e.g. 2d6r1, 1d20rr1, 4d6r1h3. Several terms, plus bare integer constants, may joined + - one notation (e.g. 1d20+1d6, 2d20h+2d20l); least one dice term required keep drop selector applies within term . n Number whole-notation rolls simulate. positive integer. x roll_distribution object, returned roll_distribution(). ... Ignored, compatibility print() plot() generics.

title: Summarise the outcome distribution of repeated rolls — roll_distribution
text: roll_distribution object: list counts (integer vector observed totals, named outcome value, ordered ascending; zero-count outcomes omitted), range (theoretical c(min, max) grand total, sum across terms term's min/max plus signed constants), n, terms (parsed per-term breakdown), original notation. single-term notation parsed components dice_n, x, m, keep, keep_n, reroll, reroll_t also present top level; omitted multi-term notation. print() method renders counts text histogram console.

title: Summarise the outcome distribution of repeated rolls — roll_distribution
text: plot() returns themed ggplot2::ggplot() bar chart sampled counts across notation's theoretical total range. returned object auto-prints called top level can captured extended +.

title: Summarise the outcome distribution of repeated rolls — roll_distribution

what: rollr2: Roll Tabletop RPG Dice from Notation — rollr2-package
title: rollr2: Roll Tabletop RPG Dice from Notation — rollr2-package
text: Parses rolls tabletop RPG dice notation "2d20+2", reporting individual die results, totals, outcome distribution across repeated rolls.

title: rollr2: Roll Tabletop RPG Dice from Notation — rollr2-package
text: Maintainer: Felix Mil felix.mil@esqlabs.com Authors: Felix Mil felix.mil@esqlabs.com

title: rollr2 0.0.0.9000
text: plot.roll() returns themed ggplot notation’s exact outcome distribution rolled total’s bar highlighted percentile standing subtitle; always shows theoretical distribution ignores compare flag. plot.roll_distribution() returns themed ggplot bar chart sampled totals across notation’s range. roll() rolls dice-notation string , returning individual die results total (sum dice plus modifier). roll() gains compare argument , TRUE, prints notation’s full outcome distribution text histogram rolled total’s bar marked header stating percent outcomes roll beats; standing computed exactly (never sampled), given notation total across sessions. Defaults FALSE, leaving existing output unchanged. roll_distribution() rolls dice-notation string many times summarises distribution totals, printing counts per outcome text histogram console. functions accept notation form NdX, NdX+M, NdX-M, count-omitted dX variants (case-insensitive d, whitespace-tolerant), plus optional keep selector h/l die size keeps highest lowest K dice (e.g. 2d20h, 4d6h3, 3d6l2, defaulting K = 1). slot also accepts inverse drop spelling dl/dh/d discards lowest/highest K dice sums rest (e.g. 4d6dl1, conventional D&D ability-score roll, equals 4d6h3; shorthand 4d6d1 drops lowest, missing count drops one die, K must satisfy 1 <= K <= N - 1). notation may also sum several terms joined +/-, together bare integer constants (e.g. 1d20+1d6, 2d20h+2d20l, 1d20+1d6+1d4+3); least one dice term required, - term subtracts whole contribution, selector applies within term . reject invalid notation, non-positive non-integer die counts, die sizes 2, keep counts zero exceeding die count, drop counts leave fewer one die, non-positive-integer repetition counts clear errors. functions gain exploding-dice marker die size, keep selector modifier: ! rerolls maximum-face die sums faces (extra die explode), !! keeps rerolling maximum recurs, capped 100 chained rerolls per die (e.g. 2d6!, 2d6!!, 4d6!h3, 2d6!+1). die explodes independently per-die total keep selection. roll() warns !! die reaches cap; exact outcome distribution feeding roll(compare = TRUE) plot() methods depth-capped cap normalized sum 1, stays finite matches sampler. functions gain reroll marker slot explode marker (two mutually exclusive within term): rT rerolls die showing value <= T, keeping new value unconditionally, rrT rerolls die showing <= T lands strictly T (e.g. 2d6r1, 1d20rr1, 4d6r1h3, 2d6r1+2). threshold T required must 1 die size minus 1. Reroll changes die’s value keep selection never warns; exact outcome distribution feeding roll(compare = TRUE) plot() methods accounts matches sampler.
